titleStmt.title: SII 10.446: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 446. (A.R. No. 101 of 1917.) ON A NANDI STONE SET UP NEAR THE TEMPLE OF RĀMALINGASVĀMI AT MANDAḌAM, GUNTUR TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 1201. (Pramādi)

summary.p: States that a certain Amariseṭṭi gave 25 cows for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Rāmīśvara of Mandaram in Doḍḍi Kaṇḍravāḍa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śubhaśakava¨rṣaṁbulu
1201 Agu nēṁṭi pramādina
ṁsavatsara caitra śuddha 13 Āditya
vāramu viṣuvusaṁkrāṁtikālamu
na doḍḍikaṁḍravāṭini kriṣṇavēṇīnadītī
ramuna maṁdaramaṁdu catu¨rddaśabhu
vanādhīśvaruṁ ḍaina śrīrāmīśvara
śrīmahādēvaraku penuṁgoṁḍaśā
sanulu vainyakula va¨rddhanulu sūru
koligōtramu . brahmari pautrulu
kriṣṇataṭākamu tuṟukēśvara
śrīmahādēvadivyaśrīpādava
dmārādhaku taina Amariseṭiko
ḍku rēviseṭi kulapāvanuṁ ḍaina
suputruṁḍu Amariseṭi
tamaku dha¨rmmā¨rtthakāmyamu
gā nakhaṁḍa dīpānaku
Ācaṁdratārakamugā niccina
gōvulu 25 vīniṁ jēkoni ra
kṣiṁcci dīpānaku nityamāneṁ
ḍu samaru naḍapiḍivāṁḍu
trullūri golla prōlebōyu
nikoḍku pōtebōyuṁḍu .

svadataṁ paradattaṁ vā yō ha
rēti vasuṁdharā . ṣaṣṭi varu
ṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyā
ṁ jāyatē krimi . svadattā
dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ parada
ttānupālināṁ . parada
ttāpahārēṇa svadataṁ niṣphalaṁ
bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 10.446 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
